film.title: Down to Earth
film.overview: Upset at a new Broadway musical mocking The Nine Muses, Greek goddess Terpsichore comes down to earth to land a part in the show and change it.

dialogues.dialogue: Let's sit for a while All right, but only ten minutes Damn you! You're shameless. - Cross so soon? Will you leave, or do I complain to the lady? All right, forgive me. - As if you'll ever mend your ways

Bloody English pudding Do you Parsis think yourselves to be the Angrez? Spare her. Aren't you ashamed? Venting your frustrations on a baby? What's the creed of pain? What sect are tears? Every star is a distant one, any hand that reaches, is far too short
There are no barbers around The barber did a great job Aren't you ashamed of doing such vile things in the name of religion? Where's Moti? - Drag him out There
